parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Temu router request body. The `type` field must be `bg.glo.goods.add`.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: app_key
x-temu-common-parameters.description: 已创建成功的应用标志

x-temu-common-parameters.name: timestamp
x-temu-common-parameters.description: 时间戳，格式为UNIX时间（秒） ，长度10位，当前时间-300秒<=入参时间<=当前时间+300秒

x-temu-common-parameters.name: sign
x-temu-common-parameters.description: API入参参数签名，签名值根据如下算法给出计算过程

x-temu-common-parameters.name: data_type
x-temu-common-parameters.description: 请求返回的数据格式，可选参数固定为JSON

x-temu-common-parameters.name: access_token
x-temu-common-parameters.description: 用户授权令牌access_token，卖家中心—授权管理，申请授权生成

x-temu-common-parameters.name: version
x-temu-common-parameters.description: API版本，默认为V1，无要求不传此参数

x-temu-request-parameters.name: coverUrl
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Video Cover Image (B-side stores the first frame image)

x-temu-request-parameters.name: floorId
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Floor ID, null: Create new, otherwise Update

x-temu-request-parameters.name: type
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Component Type, image - image, text - text

x-temu-request-parameters.name: key
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Floor Type Key, currently defaults to 'DecImage'

x-temu-request-parameters.name: vid
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Basic Attribute Value ID, pass 0 if none

x-temu-request-parameters.name: valueUnit
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Unit of Attribute Value, empty string if not available

x-temu-request-parameters.name: carouselImageUrls
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Commodity Carousel, not required for apparel category, will be aggregated from skc

x-temu-request-parameters.name: productName
x-temu-request-parameters.offlineReferenceReason: product name length limits by category

x-temu-request-parameters.name: productName
x-temu-request-parameters.offlineReferenceReason: product name length limits by category

x-temu-request-parameters.name: modelId
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Model ID, not transmitted for new virtual model scenarios

x-temu-request-parameters.name: modelType
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Model Type, 1: Garment Model, 2: Shoe Model

x-temu-request-parameters.name: modelFeature
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Model Properties, 1: Real Model, 2: Virtual Model

x-temu-request-parameters.name: shipmentLimitSecond
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Promised Delivery Time (unit: s). Basic options: 86400, 172800, 259200 (available only for custom items).

x-temu-request-parameters.name: sensitiveTransNormalFileReqs
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Sensitive Product Conversion to General Proof Document List

x-temu-request-parameters.name: cat7Id

x-temu-request-parameters.description: 9th Level Category ID, pass 0 if none

x-temu-request-parameters.description: Key Display Size Table Template ID List

x-temu-request-parameters.name: imgUrlList
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Image List, empty list implies deletion, null implies no change

x-temu-request-parameters.name: cat2Id
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Secondary Category ID, pass 0 if none

x-temu-request-parameters.name: vid
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Basic Attribute Value ID, pass 0 if none

x-temu-request-parameters.name: valueGroupId
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Attribute Value Group ID, 0 if none

x-temu-request-parameters.name: valueGroupName
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Attribute Group Name, pass empty string if none

x-temu-request-parameters.name: valueUnit
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Unit of Attribute Value, empty string if not available

x-temu-request-parameters.name: productWhExtAttrReq
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Commodity Warehouse and Supply Chain Extension Properties Request

x-temu-request-parameters.name: outerGoodsUrl
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Off-Site Product Link (Pass Empty String as Fallback)

x-temu-request-parameters.name: extCode
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Product SKC External Code, pass empty string if not available

x-temu-request-parameters.name: productSkuReqs
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Product SKU List (up to 10 for Apparel Category)

x-temu-request-parameters.name: currencyType
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Currency (CNY: Chinese Yuan, USD: US Dollar) (Default: Chinese Yuan)

x-temu-request-parameters.name: numberOfPieces
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Quantity, default is 1 for single item

x-temu-request-parameters.name: individuallyPacked
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Whether to use independent packaging (pass -1 to clear)

x-temu-request-parameters.name: productSkuNetContentReq
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Net Content Request, passing an empty object indicates clearing

x-temu-request-parameters.name: netContentUnitCode
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Net Content Unit, 1: Fluid Ounce, 2: Milliliter, 3: Gallon, 4: Liter, 5: Gram, 6: Kilogram, 7: Troy Ounce, 8: Pound

x-temu-request-parameters.name: netContentNumber
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Net Content Value, the target value needs to be multiplied by 1000 before passing the value. For example, if you are passing "1 L", you need to pass "1000" in "netContentNumber".

x-temu-request-parameters.name: mixedType
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Mixed set type, 1: different products, 2: same product with different specifications

x-temu-request-parameters.name: netContentUnitCode
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Net Content Unit, 1: Fluid Ounce, 2: Milliliter, 3: Gallon, 4: Liter, 5: Gram, 6: Kilogram, 7: Troy Ounce, 8: Pound

x-temu-request-parameters.name: netContentNumber
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Net Content Value, the target value needs to be multiplied by 1000 before passing the value. For example, if you are passing "1 L", you need to pass "1000" in "netContentNumber".

x-temu-request-parameters.name: skuClassification
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Sku Category, 1: Single Product, 2: Combination Set, 3: Mixed Suite

x-temu-request-parameters.description: Product SKC External Code, pass empty string if not available

x-temu-request-parameters.name: sensitiveList
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Sensitive Type PURE_ELECTRIC(110001,"Pure Electric"), INTERNAL_ELECTRIC(120001, "Internal Electric"), MAGNETISM(130001, "Magnetism"), LIQUID(140001, "Liquid"), POWDER(150001, "Powder"), PASTE(160001, "Ointment"), CUTTER(170001, "Tool")

x-temu-request-parameters.name: previewImgUrls
x-temu-request-parameters.description: List of Preview Images, not required for non-apparel categories

x-temu-request-parameters.name: imgUrlList
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Image List, empty list implies deletion, null implies no change

x-temu-request-parameters.name: productSaleExtAttrReq

x-temu-request-parameters.name: discreetShipping
x-temu-request-parameters.description: This parameter is required for adult products (category ID: 16571). Setting this service will display the corresponding logo on the consumer order page, which can improve payment conversion rates. Merchants cannot display the details of the purchased items on the shipping packaging. If a consumer complains about failure to maintain confidentiality and the complaint is verified, the merchant may be held liable for after-sales service.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: productNoChargerReq
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Product No Charger Version Information (empty list must be sent to clear from has to none)

x-temu-request-parameters.name: noChargerProductIds
x-temu-request-parameters.description: No Charger Version Product ID (pass empty list to clear)

x-temu-request-parameters.name: personalizationSwitch
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Whether to Support Customized Template, 0: Not Supported, 1: Supported

x-temu-request-parameters.name: cat10Id
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Tenth-Level Category ID, pass 0 if none

rows.错误描述: 服务器开小差
rows.解决办法: 一般是系统抖动，可参考具体报错文案尝试解决或重试，如果还不行请联系管理员

rows.错误描述: 参数错误
rows.解决办法: 结合参数错误的具体原因排查

rows.错误描述: 系统异常
rows.解决办法: 尝试重试，如果还不行请联系管理员

rows.错误描述: 自定义规格属性校验失败
rows.解决办法: 请结合校验失败具体原因检查规格入参

rows.错误描述: 商品体积录入有误，请遵循最长边 ≥ 次长边 ≥ 最短边
rows.解决办法: 商品体积录入有误，请遵循最长边 ≥ 次长边 ≥ 最短边

rows.错误描述: 不合法或不可用的品牌
rows.解决办法: 输入的品牌信息不可用或id不正确

rows.错误描述: 体积内容必须遵循最长边 ≥ 次长边 ≥ 最短边原则
rows.解决办法: 体积内容必须遵循最长边 ≥ 次长边 ≥ 最短边原则

rows.错误描述: 当前类目净含量必填
rows.解决办法: 请填写净含量

rows.错误描述: 半托管商品英文标题最少需要x个字
rows.解决办法: 英文标题不满足字数要求，请重新输入

rows.错误描述: 属性值id[x]的属性值名称有误
rows.解决办法: 属性值id与属性值不匹配，请检查入参

rows.错误描述: 商品不符合大件标准，不可使用大件商品运费模版
rows.解决办法: 请选择非大件运费模板，或者重新维护商品体积

rows.错误描述: 货品属性校验失败
rows.解决办法: 请结合校验失败具体原因检查属性入参

rows.错误描述: 尺码表校验失败
rows.解决办法: 请结合校验失败具体原因检查尺码表入参

rows.错误描述: 童鞋适用年龄和鞋子不匹配，请确认后填写
rows.解决办法: 请确认填写内容

rows.错误描述: 不合法的规格属性
rows.解决办法: specId与specName不匹配，请检查入参

rows.错误描述: 不合法的类目
rows.解决办法: 入参类目id不合法，或者查询类目信息接口抖动，请重试，如果不行请更换类目

rows.错误描述: 属性模板查询失败
rows.解决办法: 接口抖动，或者当前类目未配置属性模板，请尝试重试，如果不行联系管理员处理

rows.错误描述: 服饰类目skc轮播图[x]校验失败，应符合宽高比例为3:4，宽>=1340px，高>=1785px，<=2M
rows.解决办法: 上传图片不符合格式要求，请重新上传

rows.错误描述: 素材图[x]校验失败，应符合图片宽高比例为1:1，宽>=800px，高>=800px，<=2M
rows.解决办法: 上传图片不符合格式要求，请重新上传

rows.错误描述: 非服饰类目货品轮播图x校验失败，应符合宽高比例为1:1，宽>=800px，高>=800px，<=2M
rows.解决办法: 上传图片不符合格式要求，请重新上传

rows.错误描述: 非服饰类目sku预览图[x]校验失败，应符合宽高比例为1:1，宽>=800px，高>=800px，<=2M
rows.解决办法: 上传图片不符合格式要求，请重新上传

rows.错误描述: 图片[x]格式校验失败，只允许.JPG .JPEG .PNG
rows.解决办法: 请上传JPG、JPEG、PNG的图片

rows.错误描述: 当前图片中文字请使用销售目的地官方语言，请重新上传[x]
rows.解决办法: 图片存在中文，请重新上传

rows.错误描述: 图片是否存在牛皮癣校验失败,请重试
rows.解决办法: 查询接口失败，请重试

rows.错误描述: 服装类目skc下价格需要保持一致，请进行调整
rows.解决办法: 服装类目skc下价格需要保持一致，请进行调整

rows.错误描述: 市场部店铺发布货品需要外部商品链接
rows.解决办法: 请补齐外部商品链接

rows.错误描述: 请选择正确的币种
rows.解决办法: 输入的币种入参不合法

rows.错误描述: 暂不支持变更币种
rows.解决办法: 报价格币种需和店铺支持币种保持一致

rows.错误描述: 模特数据校验失败
rows.解决办法: 请结合具体失败原因解决

rows.错误描述: 录入申报价格大于x元，商品无法创建成功
rows.解决办法: 达到申报价格上限，请合理输入

rows.错误描述: 说明书文件[x]校验失败，单页应<=[x]M，长x宽应为1600*1200
rows.解决办法: 上传说明书不符合格式要求，请重新上传

rows.错误描述: 当前不支持设置备货区域
rows.解决办法: 当前店铺不支持设置备货区域，如有疑问请咨询管理员

rows.错误描述: 图片不合法，不支持空url
rows.解决办法: 请勿传入空url

rows.错误描述: 运费模板不存在
rows.解决办法: 输入的运费模板id不正确，或者查询运费模板信息失败，请稍后重试，如果不行请联系管理员

rows.错误描述: 货品运费模板校验失败
rows.解决办法: 运费模板运费、区域信息校验失败，请结合具体错误信息解决

rows.错误描述: 产地必填
rows.解决办法: 请补充产地

rows.错误描述: 说明书未上传
rows.解决办法: 请上传说明书

rows.错误描述: 说明书英文内容不合格，请重新上传
rows.解决办法: 说明书英文内容不合格，请重新上传

rows.错误描述: URL域名校验不通过或URL包含不合法字符串
rows.解决办法: 请检查入参位URL的字段

rows.错误描述: 说明书缺少必要语言
rows.解决办法: 说明书缺少必要语言

rows.错误描述: 说明书语言错误
rows.解决办法: 说明书语言入参不合法，请检查

rows.错误描述: 商品标签未填写，请重新上传
rows.解决办法: 请填写商品标签

rows.错误描述: 创建失败。您已创建相同或高度相似的商品，建议您重新编辑商品信息，避免重复创建相同或高度相似的商品
rows.解决办法: 重新编辑商品信息，避免重复创建相同或高度相似的商品

rows.错误描述: 创建失败，存在重复的货品属性
rows.解决办法: 重新编辑商品信息，避免重复创建相同或高度相似的商品

rows.错误描述: 您当前帐户预留金额不足，无法发布商品，请前往【结算管理-资金中心】充值
rows.解决办法: 请前往【结算管理-资金中心】充值

rows.解决办法: 请签署合规声明

rows.错误描述: 您当前账户预留金额不足，无法选择定制商品，请前往【结算管理-资金中心】充值

rows.错误描述: 您当前账户预留金额不足，无法选择定制商品，请等待货款回款足额后再进行开启定制

type.description: API接口名, 形如:bg.* Must be `bg.glo.goods.add` for this operation.

app_key.description: 已创建成功的应用标志

timestamp.description: 时间戳，格式为UNIX时间（秒） ，长度10位，当前时间-300秒<=入参时间<=当前时间+300秒

sign.description: API入参参数签名，签名值根据如下算法给出计算过程

data_type.description: 请求返回的数据格式，可选参数固定为JSON

access_token.description: 用户授权令牌access_token，卖家中心—授权管理，申请授权生成

version.description: API版本，默认为V1，无要求不传此参数

productName.x-temu-offline-reference-reason: product name length limits by category
